Uses of Class
javashooter.gameobjects.GameObject

Packages that use GameObject
Package
Description
javashooter.collider
Package containing the main Collider class and its subclasses.
javashooter.controller
The javashooter.controller package contains Object controllers that govern an objects behavior, without being involved in its collision or drawing properties.
javashooter.gameobjects
This package contains the class GameObject and some subclasses defined for convenience and ease of use.
javashooter.gameutils
 
javashooter.playground
The package javashooter.playground contains all classes implementing and describing game levels.
javashooter.rendering

  • Uses of GameObject in javashooter.gameobjects

    Subclasses of GameObject in javashooter.gameobjects
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AnimatedGameobject
    Convenience Class subclassing GameObject, pre-creationg a subclass of Artist that draws a bitmap animation described by the Animation class.
    class 
    BitmapObject
    Convenience Class subclassing GameObject, pre-creationg a subclass of Artist that draws a bitmap animation described by the Animation class.
    class 
    CircleObject
    Convenience Class subclassing GameObject, pre-creationg a subclass of Artist that draws a circular white object.
    class 
    FallingStar
    Convenience Class subclassing GameObject, pre-creationg a subclass of Artist that draws a circular white point.
    class 
    RectObject
    Convenience Class subclassing GameObject, pre-creationg a subclass of Artist that draws a rectangular object.
    class 
    TextObject
    Convenience Class subclassing GameObject, pre-creationg a subclass of Artist that draws a text.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    GameObject
    GameObject.addArtist(Artist a)
    set the Artist reference of this GmeObject.
    GameObject
    GameObject.addCollider(Collider c)
    Add a javashooter.collider to the existing list of colliders.
    GameObject

    auto-generates javashooter.collider according to box width/height

    auto-generates javashooter.collider according to box width/height
    GameObject
    CircleObject.generateColliders()
     
    GameObject
    GameObject.generateColliders()
    Can be overwritten in subclasses to generate specific colliders automatically.
